  uid=4_220 StaticText "Note:"
  uid=4_221 StaticText "1. The price is an estimate and may differ from the final price."
  uid=4_222 StaticText "2. When resource usage is calculated using the pay-per-use billing mode, decimal numerals are rounded off and accurate to two decimal places."
  uid=4_223 StaticText "3. The exchange rate used to estimate the price comes from XE.com or the country's central bank, and is for reference only."
  uid=4_224 StaticText "Tax Statement:"
  uid=4_225 StaticText "The Price Calculator only provides an estimate of fees and does not include VAT, sales tax, goods and service tax (GST), or any similar turnover tax. For details about taxes, see the tax clauses in the "
